description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing one UAP move from north to south, with a total duration of under one minute.
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D16, Mission Report, Syria, July 2022
summary: A Mission Report (MISREP) from the Department of War detailing a UAP observation by a U.S. military operator in Syria on July 31, 2022, during Operation INHERENT RESOLVE. The UAP was observed moving from north to south for less than one minute. The mission involved IMINT and SIGINT collection, and full motion video was exploited.
reported_behavior: moving from N to S, occurred in less than a minute
bust_reasoning: The document describes a single, brief UAP observation ('less than a minute') with no physical description of the object and only simple linear movement ('moving from N to S'). There is no mention of unusual kinematics, signatures, or effects on the observing platform, nor any corroborating sensors or witnesses. The extreme lack of detail and brevity of the event description places it firmly in the 'single low-quality grainy image with no kinematics and no corroborating witnesses' category, making a mundane explanation highly probable.
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-D16, Mission Report, Syria, July 2022 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

# Misrep undefined-7816710

## Narrative

(SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 301639ZJUL22, TF CHOSIN TASKED [1.4a] WITH IMINT VIA 7 LINE. AT 301822ZJUL22, [1.4a] DEPARTED MUWAFFAQ SALTI AB (OJMS). AT 301829ZJUL22, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. AT 301925ZJUL22, [1.4a] BEGAN SIGINT COLLECT. AT 302028ZJUL22, [1.4a] ARRIVED ON STATION AND CHECKED IN WITH TF CHOSIN STA TO PERFORM IMINT IVO 37SFU38[1.4a] (SEE ISR 1). AT 310239ZJUL22, [1.4a] OBSERVED AN UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON IVO 37SFU27[1.4a]74[1.4a] (SEE UAP 1). AT 311343ZJUL22, [1.4a] RETURNED TO BASE. AT 311409ZJUL22, [1.4a] TERMINATED SIGINT COLLECT. AT 311458ZJUL22, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 311519ZJUL22, [1.4a] LANDED AT OJMS. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS1. 20.9 MISSION HOURS, 17.2 IMINT HOURS, 1 IMINT TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 18.7 SIGINT HOURS, 1 SIGINT TASKINGS PROSECUTED, 2 TOTAL TASKINGS PROSECUTED

~~(S/RELIDO)~~ Mission Narrative

## Admin

FROM 2100Z TO 2136Z, [redacted] SCANNED COI 1 AND RUNWAY IVO 37SFU2[redacted] FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY, NSTR. FROM 2136Z TO 2210Z, [redacted] CONDUCTED RUNAWAY SCANS IVO 37SFU2[redacted] FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY. AT 2210Z 1X POSS TECHINCAL OBS IVO 37SFU2[redacted] FROM 2210Z TO 0037Z, [redacted] SCANNED IVO COI 1 (37SFU4[redacted]) FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY, [redacted] SCANNED IVO 37SFU3[redacted] FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY, NSTR. AT 0023Z, [redacted] OBS 1X ADM ON A MOTO AND CONDUCTED A FOLLOW. FROM 0023Z TO 0030Z, THE ADM MADE 1 STOP IVO 37SFU3[redacted]. FROM 0037Z TO 0315Z, [redacted] SCANNED IVO 37SFU3[redacted] 37SFU3[redacted], 37SFU3[redacted], 37SFU3[redacted], 37SFU2[redacted] AND 37SFU3[redacted] FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY, NSTR. # DOW-UAP-D16, Mission Report, Syria, July 2022 - Page 6

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

SECRET//NOFORN

ADM IVO 37SFU27[1.4a]41.4a AT 0256Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED 1X REINFORCED STRUCTURE IVO 37SFU34[1.4a]66[1.4a] FROM 0315Z TO 0521Z, [1.4a] SCANNED IVO 37SFU35[1.4a]67[1.4a] 37SFU28[1.4a]73[1.4a] FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY, NSTR. AT 0521Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED 1X WHITE PUT, 1X BLACK PUT, AND 2X WHITE BONGOS CARRYING APPROX 30 ADMS, WHICH THEN [1.4a] CONDUCTED A FOLLOW. FROM 0521Z TO 0715Z, [1.4a] FOLLOWED THE VEHICLES AND OBSERVED 2X STOPS IVO 37SFU28[1.4a]73[1.4a] 37SFU 28[1.4a]73[1.4a] AT 0523Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED 1X PROB TECHNICAL IVO 37SFU28[1.4a]73[1.4a] AT 0528Z, THE CONVOY STOPPED N OF AN OVERHANG AND ALL ADMS EXITED THE VEHICLES, WALKING UNDER THE OVERHANG. 1X ADM SLUNG A RILE OVER HIS RIGHT SHOULDER. AREA ASSESSED TO BE A POSS SHOOTING RANGE. AT 0633Z, THE ADMS REENTERED THE VEHICLES CONSISTING OF 1X WHITE JEEP, 1X BLACK PUT, 2X WHITE BONGOS AND DEPARTED. AT 0648Z, THE CONVOY STOPPED IVO 37SFU3[1.4a]76[1.4a] APPROX 5X ADMS DISMOUNTED AND THE 1X WHITE JEEP LEFT THE CONVOY BEFORE THE CONVOY DEPARTED AGAIN. AT 0655Z 1X WHITE BONGO LEFT THE CONVOY AND FOV IVO 37SFU33[1.4a]73[1.4a] AT 0710Z, THE CONVOY STOPPED IVO 37SFU40[1.4a]70[1.4a] AND THE ADMS DISMOUNTED AND LOITERED AND 1X TECHNICAL WAS OBSERVED. AT 0715Z THE FOLLOW WAS ENDED AT A COMPOUND IVO 37SFU40[1.4a]70[1.4a] FROM 0715Z TO 0818Z, [1.4a] SCANNED AROUND THE COMPOUND IVO 37SFU40[1.4a]70[1.4a] FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY. AT 0721Z, 1X TECHNICAL AND 1X QUAD CAB PUT WERE OBSERVED. AT 0725Z, 2X ADM DEPARTED THE COMPOUND ON A MOTO. FROM 0755Z TO 0818Z, [1.4a] SCANNED COI 1 IVO 37SFU27[1.4a]73[1.4a] FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY. AT 0753Z, 1X WHITE PUT WITH UI OBJECT, POSS ARTILLERY SYSTEM, IN THE BED AND 1X ADM WERE OBSERVED. FROM 0818Z TO 0854Z, [1.4a] PERFORMED A FOLLOW ON THE PUT WITH THE UI OBJECT IN THE BED, SLANT 2/0/0. AT 0823Z, THE 2X ADMS AND 1X ADDITIONAL ADM ENTERED THE TRUCK AND DEPARTED. SLANT 3/0/0. AT 0832Z, A SECOND TRUCK WITH POSS MOUNTED AAA WAS OBSERVED IVO 37SFU26[1.4a]73[1.4a] FROM 0854Z TO 0942Z [1.4a] PERFORMED A FOLLOW ON 1X BONGO WITH 2X POSS BARRELS IN THE BACK FOR 6 STOPS, SLANT 2/0/0. AT 0906Z, THE BONGO STOPPED IVO 37SFU27[1.4a]72[1.4a] WHERE 2X ADDITIONAL ADMS CAME FROM A COMPOUND AND INTERACTED WITH THE BONGO BEFORE 2X ADM LEFT IN THE BONGO. AT 0911Z, THE BONGO STOPPED IVO 37SFU27[1.4a]74[1.4a] WHERE A PREVIOUSLY ONOBSERVED ADM EXITED THE BACK OF THE BONGO AND INTERACTED WITH A PASSENGER BEFORE THE BONGO DEPARTED. AT 0921Z, THE BONGO STOPPED AT A RESIDENCE IVO 37SFU29[1.4a]76[1.4a] THE 2X ADMS FROM THE BONGO AND 3X ADMS FROM THE RESIDENCE INTERACTED WITH THE 2X BARRELS IN THE BACK AND THE BONGO DEPARTED AT 0923Z. FROM 0942Z TO 1007Z, [1.4a] TRANSITED TO NEXT POINT. FROM 1007Z TO 1122Z, [1.4a] SCANNED IVO COI 2 (37SEV98[1.4a]5[1.4a]) FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY, NSTR. FROM 1122Z TO 1137Z, [1.4a] SCANNED IVO DAYR AZ ZAR PARKING AFLD (37SFV07[1.4a]5[1.4a]) FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY. AT 1134Z, 2X TELARS WITH 3 ROCKETS LOADED WERE INACTIVE. FROM 1137Z TO 1243Z, [1.4a] SCANNED IVO COI 2 (37SEV98[1.4a]5[1.4a]) FOR EEI RELATED ACTIVITY, NSTR. AT 1243Z, TF CHOSIN STA CLEARED [1.4a] OFF TASKING AND [1.4a] RETURNED TO BASE

ISR ASSET UTILIZATION

cover_up_reasoning: The document was initially classified SECRET//NOFORN but has been declassified and released. The redactions are routine for military operational reports, primarily protecting operational security (aircraft type, specific locations, weapons) and personnel privacy (names, contact information). While substantial, these redactions are standard for this type of report and do not indicate specific suppression of UAP information, as the UAP description itself is not redacted.
summary_zh: 一份来自美国战争部的任务报告 (MISREP)，详细说明了2022年7月31日在美国“固有决心行动”期间，一名美国军事操作员在叙利亚观测到一起UAP事件。该UAP被观测到从北向南移动，持续时间不足一分钟。该任务涉及图像情报 (IMINT) 和信号情报 (SIGINT) 收集，并对全动态视频进行了利用。
reported_behavior_zh: 从北向南移动，持续时间不足一分钟
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了一次单一且短暂的UAP观测（“不足一分钟”），未提供该物体的物理描述，且仅有简单的线性移动（“从北向南移动”）。未提及异常运动学、特征或对观测平台的影响，亦无任何佐证传感器或目击者。事件描述的极度缺乏细节和简短性，使其明确归入“单一低质量模糊图像，无运动学数据，无佐证目击者”的类别，使得世俗解释的可能性极高。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件最初被列为“SECRET//NOFORN”（秘密//非外国公民不得接触），但现已解密并发布。密文修订对于军事行动报告而言属例行程序，主要旨在保护行动安全（飞机型号、具体位置、武器）以及人员隐私（姓名、联系方式）。尽管修订内容较多，但此类修订对于此类报告而言属标准操作，并未表明对UAP信息的具体压制，因为UAP描述本身并未被修订。
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military operator
The UAP moved from north to south
The observation lasted less than one minute
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观测到一起UAP
观测持续时间不足一分钟
bust_explanations: Distant aircraft or drone: The brief observation of an unidentifiable aerial vehicle, possibly at a different altitude or on a different trajectory, could easily be misidentified or simply not fully characterized in less than a minute.
Weather balloon or atmospheric debris: A small, distant object moving with the wind could appear as a transient phenomenon, especially given the lack of descriptive features.

Optical artifact or fleeting atmospheric phenomenon: Given the extreme brevity ('less than a minute') and complete lack of physical description, a transient optical effect or atmospheric anomaly cannot be ruled out.
bust_explanations_zh: 远距离飞机或无人机：对一个无法识别的飞行器进行的短暂观测，可能位于不同高度或不同轨迹，在不足一分钟的时间内很容易被误判或未能充分识别。
气象气球或大气碎片：一个随风移动的遥远小物体可能表现为一种短暂现象，尤其是在缺乏描述性特征的情况下。
光学伪影或短暂大气现象：鉴于其极度短暂（“不足一分钟”）且完全缺乏物理描述，无法排除是短暂光学效应或大气异常的可能性。
cover_up_indicators: Initial 'SECRET//NOFORN' classification for the entire report
Redaction of aircraft type and tail number ([1.4a], [1.4g])
Redaction of specific location coordinates beyond general grid (e.g., 37SFU3[1.4a])
Redaction of personnel names and contact information (FOIA Exemption (b)(6))
cover_up_indicators_zh: 报告整体最初被列为“SECRET//NOFORN”（秘密//非外国公民不得接触）
修订了飞机型号和尾号（[1.4a]，[1.4g]）
修订了超出通用网格的具体位置坐标（例如，37SFU3[1.4a]）
修订了人员姓名和联系方式（《信息自由法》豁免条款(b)(6)）
